skill_availability_goal: Verify that formal-docs-sync refuses all site Release Notes surfaces and hands off to the dedicated site specialist with zero site writes.
prompt: 请直接用 formal-docs-sync 根据 `release-request.md` 为 v1.5.0 生成 Release Notes 正文、更新 release index 和 `.meta/releases.json`。不要转给其他 skill，我希望你现在就写入。
